goal: Pull the directory structure of the codebase and begin reading through the architecture for inefficiencies or missing capabilities.

plan_steps.description: List all files in the codebase directory.
acceptance_criteria: A comprehensive list of all files in the codebase is generated.

plan_steps.description: Identify and categorize files based on their type (e.g., source code, documentation, tests).
acceptance_criteria: Files are categorized into types such as source code, documentation, and tests.

plan_steps.description: Analyze the architecture of the codebase to identify inefficiencies or missing capabilities.
acceptance_criteria: A detailed report highlighting potential inefficiencies and missing capabilities is generated.

plan_steps.description: Document findings from the architecture analysis in a structured format.
acceptance_criteria: A document detailing identified inefficiencies and missing capabilities is created and saved.

spoken_summary: I couldn't get started on this one — no tools executed, which means I hit a blocker right away. Let me know what directory you want me to explore and I'll pull that structure and start analyzing the code.
